mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_order ( order_no, user_id, total_price, pay_status, pay_type, order_status, extra_info, is_deleted, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{totalPrice}, #{payStatus}, #{payType}, #{orderStatus}, #{extraInfo}, 0, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT order_id, order_no, user_id, total_price, pay_status, pay_type, pay_time, order_status, extra_info, is_deleted, create_time, update_time FROM tb_order WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
SELECT order_id, order_no, user_id, total_price, pay_status, pay_type, pay_time, order_status, extra_info, is_deleted, create_time, update_time FROM tb_order WHERE order_no = #{orderNo}

SELECT o.order_id, o.order_no, o.total_price, o.pay_status, o.order_status, o.create_time, o.pay_time, COUNT(oi.item_id) as item_count FROM tb_order o LEFT JOIN tb_order_item oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE o.user_id = #{userId} AND o.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY o.order_id ORDER BY o.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_order WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT o.order_id, o.order_no, o.total_price, o.pay_status, o.pay_type, o.order_status, o.extra_info, o.create_time, o.pay_time FROM tb_order o WHERE o.order_id = #{orderId} AND o.user_id = #{userId} AND o.is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_order SET order_status = #{orderStatus}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
UPDATE tb_order SET pay_status = #{payStatus}, pay_type = #{payType}, pay_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
